      "text": "un Jehlabs dewe Eesa-

nu/ un tas ehde un dsehre/ un

dsunschanas-(Teezu.)
"

    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz/ ka Ahbräams man-
nat Balti irr paklautigs bijis/

nas/ Eestahdijums/ Liktumus
un Vaustibas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta mitte Jhsääks Gerarâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tahs Weetas Zilwekt
waizaja pahr winna Seewu/ un
winſch fazzija : ta irr manna
Mahfa/ jo winſch bihjajahs faz-
ziht/ ta irr manna Seewa/ ka ne
jaschu (fazzija tas) tahs Weetas
Zilwekti mann nokanij Rebekkas
deht/ jo tai bija skaists Gihmis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad winſch ilgu Laiku tur
bij dshwojis/ tad skattijahs Abi-
meleks to Wihlisteru Kehniisch
zaur Lohgu/un reds/ Jhsääks glai-
moja ar fawu Seewu Rebekku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad aizinaja Abimeleks to
Jhsääku/ un fazzija: Itt teefcham/
raugi/ ta irr tawa Seewa/ ka effi
tu tad fazzijis/ ta irr manna
Mahfa/ un Jhsääks fazzija us
to: tapehz/ ka es ejimu fazzijis/ ka
man winnas deht jaschu ne ja-
mirst.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Abimeleks: ka
effi tu mums fcho darrijis/ gann
drihs buhtu weens no fcheein Laut-
dim warrejs pee tawas Seewas
gulleht/ tad buhtu tu weenu No-
feegunu pahr mums weddis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Abimeleks patwehleja
wiﬀeem Laudim/ fazzidams:
Kas fcho Wihru/ jeb winna See-
wn aiskaxx/ tas taps teefcham no-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XXVI. Modalla.
Ihlääks no cet vreeſch Baddu pee Abimeleku to
Wihlisteru Kehniunu us Geraru: 1. DEews
apsohla winnam to Semmi Kanään: 2.
Sakka jawu Seewu eſsam fawu Mahfu: 6.
Ladehi tosh winſch as Abimeleka islam,
mahts: 8. Un no tahs Semmes Eedsh,
wotajeem isdsihths/ fawas leelas Baggatibas
pehz/: 12. darra pa Gallam pehz ilgas
Bahrschanas to Affku deht ar Abimeleku wee-
n Derribu: 26.
"
    },
    {

ikā bija/ un Jhsääks nogahje

hu Gerarâ.
"

    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS rahdi-

"

    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Effi Sweefchineeks fchinni

awam Tehwam Ahbräamam

"

      "n": 4,
